balizador-de-jardim-led.en: The LED garden bollard was designed to provide soft and functional exterior lighting. With a discreet vertical design and superior resistance to water and dust, it is ideal for pathways, access routes or landscaped areas. It ensures safety, orientation and an elegant visual presence in any landscaping environment.
balizador-de-jardim-led.zh: LED花园柱灯专为提供柔和实用的室外照明而设计。凭借简洁的垂直外形以及卓越的防水防尘性能，非常适合用于小径、通道或景观绿化区域。在任何景观环境中均能确保安全、引导方向，并呈现出优雅的视觉美感。

barra-led-high-bay.en: Designed for environments that demand superior robustness and high performance, the High Bay LED Bar combines protection against water, dust and impacts while maintaining uniform high-output illumination. Ideal for warehouses, factories, workshops, covered car parks, industrial spaces with humidity or harsh environments.
barra-led-high-bay.zh: High Bay LED灯管专为需要卓越坚固性和高性能的环境而设计，集防水、防尘、防冲击于一体，同时保持均匀的高效照明。非常适合仓库、工厂、车间、有顶停车场、潮湿工业空间或恶劣环境。

barra-linear-led-40w-50w.en: The 40W/50W Linear LED Bar combines efficiency and flexibility in a modern linear design, ideal for projects requiring continuous and homogeneous lighting in commercial or common spaces. Available in two power ratings, it adapts to different environments, providing uniform light and high energy performance.
barra-linear-led-40w-50w.zh: 40W/50W LED线型灯将高效性与灵活性融合于现代线型设计之中，非常适合需要连续均匀照明的商业或公共空间项目。提供两种功率规格，可适应不同环境，提供均匀光线和卓越节能效果。

barra-linear-led-45w-sensor.en: The 45W Linear LED Bar represents the perfect fusion of energy efficiency, automation technology and functional design. With 45W of power, it incorporates a motion sensor, making it ideal for projects seeking savings, safety and smart lighting in commercial environments or common areas in residential zones.
barra-linear-led-45w-sensor.zh: 45W LED线型灯是能效、自动化技术与功能设计的完美结合。额定功率45W，内置运动传感器，非常适合追求节能、安全和智能照明的商业环境或住宅公共区域项目。

barra-linear-led-fina-sensor.en: The Slim Linear LED Bar with Sensor combines efficiency and flexibility in a modern slim linear design, ideal for projects requiring continuous and homogeneous lighting in aesthetically relevant commercial or common spaces. With integrated motion detection technology, it adapts to different environments, providing uniform light and high energy performance paired with autonomous energy savings.
barra-linear-led-fina-sensor.zh: 带传感器的超薄LED线型灯将高效性与灵活性融合于现代纤薄线型设计之中，非常适合对美观要求较高的商业或公共空间的连续均匀照明需求。集成运动感应技术，可适应不同环境，提供均匀光线和卓越节能效果，同时实现自主节能。

barra-linear-led-tri-proof.en: The Weatherproof Linear LED Bar offers a robust, efficient and resistant lighting solution for demanding environments. With an efficient linear design, it combines protection against water, dust and impacts with high energy performance, ideal for industrial, commercial and protected exterior applications.
barra-linear-led-tri-proof.zh: 防水LED线型灯为严苛环境提供坚固、高效且耐用的照明解决方案。线型高效设计集防水、防尘、防冲击与高节能性能于一体，非常适合工业、商业及有遮护的室外应用场所。

barra-linear-led-ultrafina-tri-proof.en: The Ultra-Slim Linear LED Bar offers continuous and efficient lighting in an extra-thin design compared to other industrial bar lighting models. With a sealed structure, low-profile form factor and high resistance to water, dust and impacts, it is ideal for environments that demand robust performance without sacrificing elegant aesthetics.
barra-linear-led-ultrafina-tri-proof.zh: 超薄三防LED线型灯以其与其他工业条形灯相比更为纤薄的外形，提供持续高效的照明。密封结构、低调外形设计以及卓越的防水、防尘、防冲击性能，使其非常适合需要在严苛性能与优雅美观之间取得平衡的环境。

foco-encastrar-led-circular-exterior.en: This LED Recessed Spotlight combines technical robustness with discreet aesthetics, ideal for illuminating exterior elements with precision and elegance. With high resistance to water and dust, this solution is designed for in-ground or pathway installation, offering directional and effective lighting that enhances facades, sculptures or pedestrian areas with a minimalist style.
foco-encastrar-led-circular-exterior.zh: 这款LED嵌入式射灯将技术可靠性与简洁美学相结合，非常适合精准优雅地照亮室外元素。具有卓越的防水防尘性能，专为地面或通道嵌入式安装而设计，提供精准有效的定向照明，以简约风格衬托建筑外立面、雕塑或通行区域。

foco-encastrar-led-quadrado-exterior.en: This Square LED Recessed Spotlight combines technical robustness with discreet aesthetics, ideal for illuminating exterior elements with precision and elegance. With high resistance to water and dust, this solution is installed in the ground, offering directional and effective lighting that enhances facades, sculptures or pedestrian areas with a minimalist style.
foco-encastrar-led-quadrado-exterior.zh: 这款方形LED嵌入式射灯将技术可靠性与简洁美学相结合，非常适合精准优雅地照亮室外元素。具有卓越的防水防尘性能，安装于地面，提供精准有效的定向照明，以简约风格衬托建筑外立面、雕塑或通行区域。

luminaria-led-ampla-downlight.en: With modern design and sophisticated technology, the Wide LED Luminaire provides homogeneous and soft illumination, covering large areas without creating glare or pronounced shadows. An elegant, efficient solution with resistance to damp spaces, adaptable to both residential and commercial environments.
luminaria-led-ampla-downlight.zh: 宽幅LED灯具凭借现代设计与精密技术，提供均匀柔和的照明效果，覆盖大面积区域而不产生眩光或明显阴影。这是一款优雅高效、防潮的照明解决方案，既适用于住宅，也适用于商业环境。

luminaria-led-embutida-ip65.en: With modern and minimalist design, this recessed LED ceiling luminaire stands out for its high water resistance, making this solution highly efficient for damp locations or even outdoors. It offers uniform and efficient light, making it ideal for residential and commercial environments that require durability, style and low energy consumption.
luminaria-led-embutida-ip65.zh: 这款现代简约设计的LED嵌入式吸顶灯以其卓越的防水性能著称，使其成为潮湿场所甚至室外环境的高效照明选择。提供均匀高效的光线，非常适合需要耐用性、美观性和低能耗的住宅及商业环境。

luminaria-led-embutida-ip20.en: With modern and minimalist design, this recessed LED ceiling luminaire distributes light uniformly, reducing unwanted glare and shadows. Ideal for non-damp interior areas, this solution enhances diverse environments with elegance while maintaining low consumption and ensuring high-quality, long-lasting performance.
luminaria-led-embutida-ip20.zh: 这款现代简约设计的LED嵌入式吸顶灯均匀分布光线，减少不必要的眩光和阴影。非常适合干燥室内区域，以优雅的方式提升各类环境效果，同时保持低能耗并确保持久的高品质性能。

pavimento-carvalho.en: Oak flooring offers a balanced combination of durability, versatility and timeless aesthetics, making it a reliable choice for different project styles. Oak wood, with its rich texture and well-defined natural pattern, creates warm and modern environments. Available in smooth or brushed finishes with UV varnish, it adapts to the visual preferences and maintenance needs of each client. With a practical click system and stable structure, this flooring ensures easy installation, high durability and perfect integration in residential spaces.
pavimento-carvalho.zh: 橡木地板将耐用性、多功能性与永恒美学完美结合，是不同风格项目的可靠选择。橡木纹理丰富、自然纹路清晰，能营造出温馨现代的空间氛围。提供UV光油光滑面或拉丝面处理，满足不同客户的视觉喜好和维护需求。采用简便的卡扣系统和稳定结构，确保安装便捷、经久耐用，与住宅空间完美融合。

pavimento-nogueira.en: Walnut flooring combines dimensional stability, durability and a distinctive finish, ideal for environments that value elegance and authenticity. Its deep tones and natural wood grain bring sophistication to any space, while the varnish or natural oil finish options ensure protection and aesthetic enhancement. With a simple and effective click system, this flooring ensures practical installation and lasting performance, adapting to residential or commercial contexts that demand superior quality.
pavimento-nogueira.zh: 胡桃木地板将尺寸稳定性、耐用性与独特饰面完美结合，非常适合注重优雅与真实感的环境。深邃的色调和天然木纹为任何空间带来精致感，光油或天然油处理选项确保防护效果和美观提升。简单有效的卡扣系统确保安装便捷、持久耐用，适用于需要卓越品质的住宅或商业场所。

pavimento-teca.en: This multi-layer teak flooring offers natural elegance combined with maximum resistance, ideal for demanding residential and commercial environments. The warm tones and distinctive grain of teak bring visual sophistication and unique character to any space. With varnish or natural oil finishes, it enhances the original beauty of the wood and ensures lasting protection. The simple click system enables fast and efficient installation, resulting in a stable, durable and aesthetically distinctive solution.
pavimento-teca.zh: 这款多层柚木地板将自然优雅与极致耐用性相结合，非常适合要求严苛的住宅和商业环境。柚木温暖的色调和鲜明的纹理赋予空间视觉上的精致感和独特个性。光油或天然油饰面选项彰显木材原始美感并确保持久防护。简便的卡扣系统实现快速高效的安装，成就稳定、耐用且美观独特的解决方案。

pavimento-aba-vinilico.en: ABA flooring is a next-generation coating, developed with a high-performance multi-layer structure that combines comfort, resistance and dimensional stability. Thanks to the easy click system with no need for adhesive, the scratch-resistant top layer and the integrated acoustic base, this flooring achieves the ideal balance between comfort, durability and aesthetics, suitable for both residential and commercial spaces.
pavimento-aba-vinilico.zh: ABA地板是新一代地面覆盖材料，采用高性能多层结构，兼顾舒适性、耐用性和尺寸稳定性。凭借无需胶水的简便卡扣系统、耐划伤表层和集成隔音底层，该地板在舒适性、耐用性和美观性之间实现理想平衡，适用于住宅和商业空间。

pavimento-spc-vinilico.en: SPC flooring is a highly technical rigid core vinyl that combines extreme durability, waterproofing, dimensional stability and natural aesthetics. Equipped with a fast click system and integrated acoustic base, this flooring is ideal for residential and commercial environments with heavy traffic.
pavimento-spc-vinilico.zh: SPC地板是一款高度技术化的硬芯乙烯基地板，兼具极强耐用性、防水性、尺寸稳定性和自然美感。配备快速卡扣系统和集成隔音底层，非常适合住宅和商业高流量环境。

rodape-oculto.en: Concealed skirting boards were developed to ensure a continuous and clean architectural reading between walls and floors. This type of solution eliminates visible protrusions, allowing discreet and elegant integration in contemporary projects. Compatible with different types of claddings and wall thicknesses, it ensures durability and resistance without compromising aesthetics. It is an ideal technical option for those seeking minimalist sophistication while maintaining functionality and protection in transition zones. The perfect solution for environments where silent detail makes all the difference.
rodape-oculto.zh: 隐藏式踢脚线专为确保墙面与地面之间干净连续的建筑语言而研发。这种解决方案消除了可见的凸出部分，实现在当代项目中的低调优雅融合。与不同类型的覆盖材料和墙体厚度兼容，在不影响美观的前提下确保耐久性和坚固性。对于在过渡区域追求极简主义精致感同时保持功能性和防护性的用户，这是理想的技术选择——完美适合那些细节之美成就卓越体验的空间。

rodape-simples.en: Simple skirting boards ensure a harmonious transition between the floor and wall, protecting surfaces and enhancing the perception of finish in any environment. With straight lines and available in different heights, materials and finishes, this solution easily adapts to residential or commercial projects. In addition to the clean aesthetic, they offer resistance to impact and moisture, contributing to the longevity of spaces. A versatile and discreet solution for those who value detail and functionality in interior design.
rodape-simples.zh: 简单踢脚线确保地板与墙面之间的和谐过渡，保护表面并提升各类空间的整体完成度。以简洁线条呈现，提供不同高度、材料和饰面选项，轻松适应住宅或商业项目。除了简洁美观，还具有抗冲击和防潮性能，有助于延长空间寿命。对于注重室内设计细节与功能性的用户，这是一款多功能低调的解决方案。

armario-casa-de-banho.en: Modular Bathroom Cabinets were designed to offer maximum functionality, contemporary aesthetics and resistance, even in humid and heavily used environments. With a wood chipboard structure and MDF doors with lacquered or melamine/CPL finish, these cabinets stand out for their modular versatility, adapting to any project — from minimalist to classic. They also allow a high level of customisation, from module dimensions and structural layout to finishes and colours.
armario-casa-de-banho.zh: 模块化浴室柜专为在潮湿及高频使用环境中提供最大功能性、现代美感和耐用性而设计。采用刨花板结构，配备MDF门板，提供烤漆或三聚氰胺/CPL饰面，凭借模块化多功能性脱颖而出，可适应从极简到经典的任何项目设计。还支持高度定制，包括模块尺寸、结构布局、饰面和颜色选择。

armario-de-cozinha.en: The Modular Kitchen Cabinet was designed to offer maximum functionality, contemporary aesthetics and resistance, even in humid and heavily used environments. With a wood chipboard structure and MDF doors with lacquered or melamine/CPL finish, these cabinets stand out for their modular versatility, adapting to any kitchen project — from minimalist to classic. They allow a high level of customisation from module dimensions and structural layout to finishes and colours.
armario-de-cozinha.zh: 模块化厨柜专为在潮湿及高频使用环境中提供最大功能性、现代美感和耐用性而设计。采用刨花板结构，配备MDF门板，提供烤漆或三聚氰胺/CPL饰面，凭借模块化多功能性脱颖而出，可适应从极简到经典的任何厨房项目设计。支持高度定制，包括模块尺寸、结构布局、饰面和颜色选择。

roupeiro.en: The modular wardrobe was designed to offer maximum functionality, contemporary aesthetics and resistance, particularly in heavily used environments. With a wood chipboard structure and MDF doors with lacquered or melamine/CPL finish, these wardrobes stand out for their modular versatility, adapting to any project — from minimalist to classic.
roupeiro.zh: 模块化衣柜专为高频使用环境提供最大功能性、现代美感和耐用性而设计。采用刨花板结构，配备MDF门板，提供烤漆或三聚氰胺/CPL饰面，凭借模块化多功能性脱颖而出，可适应从极简到经典的任何项目设计。

canais-de-drenagem-bmc.en: BMC composite resin drainage channels offer a technically resilient, lightweight and durable solution, ideal for rainwater and industrial drainage systems in urban, commercial and industrial contexts. Their U-profile promotes continuous flow, minimising the risk of blockages, while the lightness of the composite facilitates handling and installation in projects of various sizes. A reliable and efficient solution that combines technical performance and functionality.
canais-de-drenagem-bmc.zh: BMC复合树脂排水沟渠提供技术可靠、轻量耐用的解决方案，非常适合城市、商业和工业环境中的雨水及工业排水系统。U形截面设计促进连续水流，最大程度降低堵塞风险，而复合材料的轻盈性便于各类规模工程的搬运和安装。这是一款兼具技术性能和实用功能的可靠高效解决方案。

grelha-de-drenagem-aco-inox.en: Stainless steel drainage grates ensure superior robustness, extended durability and an elegant finish, ideal for environments that demand high hygiene standards and resistance to corrosive agents. Developed to deliver excellent technical performance in commercial, industrial or residential areas, they maintain their integrity and aesthetics even under demanding conditions, ensuring functionality and longevity in water drainage.
grelha-de-drenagem-aco-inox.zh: 不锈钢排水篦子具有卓越的坚固性、持久耐用性和优雅外观，非常适合对卫生标准和耐腐蚀性要求较高的环境。专为商业、工业或住宅区域提供卓越技术性能而研发，即使在严苛条件下也能保持完整性和美观，确保排水功能性和使用寿命。

grelha-de-drenagem-bmc.en: BMC (composite resin) drainage grates represent a modern, lightweight and resistant solution, developed to ensure efficient water drainage in urban, industrial and commercial contexts. Manufactured with high-performance composite material, they combine durability with practical and fast installation. Their resistance to intensive use and demanding conditions makes these grates a reliable technical choice, maintaining functionality without compromising the surrounding aesthetics.
grelha-de-drenagem-bmc.zh: BMC（复合树脂）排水篦子是一种现代、轻量、耐用的解决方案，专为城市、工业和商业环境中的高效排水而研发。采用高性能复合材料制造，兼具耐用性与简便快速的安装性。其对高强度使用和严苛条件的耐受性使这些篦子成为可靠的技术选择，在不影响周边美观的同时保持功能性。

porta-batente.en: The simple hinged door is a discreet and versatile solution, ideal for residential or commercial projects that value a clean and functional design. With no ornamental details, it stands out for the elegance of its flat finish and the wide range of customisation options. Available in different colours and textures, it adapts to various interior concepts, ensuring a harmonious visual integration with the rest of the space. The possibility of customisation in dimensions and fitting types makes this door a practical and sophisticated choice.
porta-batente.zh: 简单平开门是一款简洁多功能的解决方案，非常适合注重简洁实用设计的住宅或商业项目。没有装饰性细节，凭借平整饰面的优雅感和广泛的定制选项脱颖而出。提供不同颜色和纹理，可适应各种室内设计风格，确保与整体空间的和谐视觉融合。在尺寸和安装类型方面的定制可能性，使这款门成为实用且精致的选择。

porta-batente-c.en: The Hinged Door with circular finish was designed to integrate harmoniously into high-end residential and commercial environments. The circular detail around the handle distinguishes itself as a design element, conveying a modern and subtly sculptural touch. Available with two types of fitting and the possibility of customisation in dimensions and colours, this door adapts to a wide range of architectural contexts, always maintaining a premium finish and a discreet yet striking presence.
porta-batente-c.zh: 带圆形饰面的平开门专为与高端住宅和商业环境和谐融合而设计。门把手周围的圆形细节作为设计元素独树一帜，赋予门体现代且略带雕塑感的质感。提供两种安装类型，支持尺寸和颜色定制，可适应多种建筑设计背景，始终保持高端饰面和低调却引人注目的存在感。

porta-batente-t.en: The Hinged Door with triangular finish stands out for the geometric detail near the handle that imparts a visual signature element combining contemporary aesthetics with functionality. Ideal for spaces that value design detail and material quality. Available with two types of fitting and the possibility of customisation in dimensions and colours, this solution easily adapts to residential or commercial projects with high aesthetic demands.
porta-batente-t.zh: 带三角形饰面的平开门以门把手附近的几何细节著称，这一视觉标志性元素将当代美学与功能性完美结合。非常适合注重设计细节和材料品质的空间。提供两种安装类型，支持尺寸和颜色定制，轻松适应对美观有高要求的住宅或商业项目。

porta-de-correr.en: The sliding door combines minimalist aesthetics with functional technology, offering a modern solution for partitions with limited space. Designed with high-quality materials and a reinforced structure, this door with an invisible sliding system is ideal for residential or commercial interiors where smart use of area is essential and attention to detail is valued.
porta-de-correr.zh: 推拉门将极简美学与功能技术相结合，为空间有限的隔断提供现代解决方案。采用高品质材料和强化结构，配备隐形推拉系统，非常适合需要智能利用空间且注重细节的住宅或商业室内环境。

porta-de-entrada-classe-3.en: The Class 3 Entry Door combines technical performance with contemporary design, ensuring security, thermal insulation and acoustic comfort. Designed to meet high standards of requirement, it is certified to provide enhanced protection without compromising aesthetics. Ideal for homes that value privacy, efficiency and style, this solution combines resistance, innovation and elegance, adapting with distinction to any residential context.
porta-de-entrada-classe-3.zh: 3级入户门将技术性能与当代设计相结合，确保安全性、隔热性和隔音舒适性。专为满足高标准要求而设计，经认证可提供增强防护，同时不影响美观。非常适合注重私密性、效能和风格的家庭，这款解决方案将坚固性、创新性和优雅性融为一体，以卓越的适应性融入任何住宅背景。

porta-de-entrada-classe-4.en: Class 4 Entry Doors elevate protection standards, combining structural resistance with a sophisticated design. With rigorous certifications, they ensure superior performance in security, thermal insulation and acoustic comfort. Intended for high-demand residential and institutional projects, these doors represent a robust and aesthetic solution, guaranteeing maximum protection without compromising architectural integration.
porta-de-entrada-classe-4.zh: 4级入户门将结构坚固性与精致设计相结合，将防护标准提升至更高水平。通过严格认证，确保在安全性、隔热性和隔音舒适性方面的卓越性能。专为高要求住宅和机构项目而设计，这些门代表着坚固且美观的解决方案，在不影响建筑整体融合的前提下提供最大防护。

porta-corta-fogo-1-folha.en: The Domus Mat single-leaf fire door without vision panel is a robust solution for environments that require complete visual isolation and maximum thermal resistance. Ideal for technical areas and evacuation routes. Fire resistance classification from 30 minutes up to 2 hours.
porta-corta-fogo-1-folha.zh: Domus Mat单扇无视窗防火门是需要完全视觉隔离和最大热阻性的环境的坚固解决方案。非常适合技术区域和疏散通道。防火等级从30分钟到2小时。

porta-corta-fogo-1-folha-visor.en: The Domus Mat single-leaf fire door with vision panel combines protection and functionality with a modern design. With a fire-resistant vision panel, it provides safe visibility between spaces, making it ideal for locations that require surveillance and fire safety.
porta-corta-fogo-1-folha-visor.zh: Domus Mat带视窗单扇防火门将防护性、功能性与现代设计相结合。配备耐火视窗玻璃，提供空间之间的安全可见性，非常适合需要监控和消防安全的场所。

porta-corta-fogo-2-folhas.en: The double-leaf fire door without vision panel offers maximum protection against fire in industrial and corporate environments with wide accesses, where privacy and thermal insulation are a priority.
porta-corta-fogo-2-folhas.zh: 无视窗双扇防火门在宽通道工业和企业环境中提供最大的防火保护，其中私密性和隔热性是首要考虑因素。

porta-corta-fogo-2-folhas-visor.en: The Domus Mat double-leaf fire door with vision panel was designed for wide and high-traffic accesses, offering excellent visibility and fire control. The fire-resistant glass vision panel in both leaves ensures safety with intelligent design. Fire resistance classification from 30 minutes up to 2 hours.
porta-corta-fogo-2-folhas-visor.zh: Domus Mat带视窗双扇防火门专为宽通道高流量场所设计，提供卓越的可见性和防火控制。两扇门叶均配备防火玻璃视窗，以智能设计确保安全性。防火等级从30分钟到2小时。

porta-multiusos.en: The Domus Mat Multi-Purpose Storage Door is the ideal choice for those seeking functionality, durability and discreet aesthetics in support environments. Designed for use in storage spaces, garages, basements or technical areas, it offers security and resistance with a simple and efficient appearance.
porta-multiusos.zh: Domus Mat多用途储物门是在辅助区域寻求功能性、耐用性和低调美感的理想选择。专为储物间、车库、地下室或技术区域而设计，以简洁高效的外观提供安全性和坚固性。

porta-de-ventilacao.en: The Domus Mat Ventilation Louvre Door is the perfect solution for environments that require permanent ventilation and airflow control, combined with robust and discreet construction. Ideal for technical spaces, machinery rooms, storage areas, garages, meter rooms and other areas where air circulation is essential.
porta-de-ventilacao.zh: Domus Mat通风百叶门是需要持续通风和气流控制的环境的完美解决方案，同时具备坚固低调的结构。非常适合技术空间、机械室、储物区域、车库、仪表间以及其他需要空气流通的场所。

guarda-corpos-aco-inox.en: Metal handrails combine safety, resistance and versatility with a functional design that easily integrates into different architectural contexts. Available in painted or stainless steel, they adapt to staircases, balconies and walkways, ensuring protection without compromising aesthetics. Painted steel stands out for its durability and excellent cost-effectiveness, while stainless steel is the ideal choice for aggressive environments, such as coastal areas, due to its superior corrosion resistance. A robust and elegant solution for demanding projects.
guarda-corpos-aco-inox.zh: 金属护栏将安全性、坚固性和多功能性与易于融入不同建筑环境的功能性设计相结合。提供烤漆钢或不锈钢两种选项，适用于楼梯、阳台和走道，在不影响美观的前提下确保防护性。烤漆钢以其耐用性和优异的性价比脱颖而出，而不锈钢则因其卓越的耐腐蚀性，成为沿海等恶劣环境的理想选择。这是一款适用于严苛项目的坚固优雅解决方案。

espelho-led-cantos-retos.en: The LED mirror with straight corners stands out for its geometric and contemporary design, ideal for modern and functional bathroom environments. Made from high-resistance technical PET, it offers robustness and longevity even under conditions of high humidity. Equipped with anti-fog technology, it keeps the surface free of condensation, ensuring a clear view at any time of day. The built-in LED lighting distributes light uniformly and without glare, providing a visually comfortable and sophisticated atmosphere.
espelho-led-cantos-retos.zh: 直角LED镜凭借其几何感和当代设计风格脱颖而出，非常适合现代功能性浴室环境。采用高强度技术PET材料制造，即使在高湿度条件下也能提供坚固性和耐用性。配备防雾技术，保持镜面无冷凝水，确保全天任何时刻视野清晰。内置LED照明均匀无眩光地分布光线，营造视觉舒适且精致的氛围。

espelho-led-cantos-arredondados.en: With a subtle design and rounded corners, this LED mirror is the ideal solution for bathrooms that value comfort, functionality and modern aesthetics. Manufactured in high-resistance technical PET, it ensures durability even in humid environments. Equipped with anti-fog technology, it keeps the surface always clean and clear. The built-in LED lighting offers soft, uniform and glare-free light, perfect for daily use. It combines advanced technology and timeless visual to elevate the experience in any bathroom space.
espelho-led-cantos-arredondados.zh: 这款圆角LED镜以其精致的设计外观成为注重舒适性、功能性和现代美感浴室的理想解决方案。采用高强度技术PET材料制造，确保即使在潮湿环境中也能保持耐用性。配备防雾技术，始终保持镜面清洁明亮。内置LED照明提供柔和均匀无眩光的光线，非常适合日常使用。融合先进技术与永恒视觉美感，提升任何浴室空间的体验。

espelho-led-cantos-retos-sem-moldura.en: The frameless LED mirror with straight corners stands out for its geometric and contemporary design, ideal for modern and functional bathroom environments. Made from high-resistance technical PET, it offers robustness and longevity even under conditions of high humidity. Equipped with anti-fog technology, it keeps the surface free of condensation, ensuring a clear view at any time of day. The built-in LED lighting distributes light uniformly and without glare, providing a visually comfortable and sophisticated atmosphere.
espelho-led-cantos-retos-sem-moldura.zh: 无框直角LED镜凭借其几何感和当代设计风格脱颖而出，非常适合现代功能性浴室环境。采用高强度技术PET材料制造，即使在高湿度条件下也能提供坚固性和耐用性。配备防雾技术，保持镜面无冷凝水，确保全天任何时刻视野清晰。内置LED照明均匀无眩光地分布光线，营造视觉舒适且精致的氛围。

espelho-redondo-led-sem-aro.en: The Round LED Mirror combines elegant design and smart functionality, ideal for bathrooms with a contemporary style. The circular structure with black finish brings sophistication and modernity to the space. Made from high-resistance technical PET, it offers robustness and longevity even under conditions of high humidity, maintaining durability over time. The integrated anti-fog technology ensures a mirror that is always clean and clear. The LED lighting offers soft, continuous and glare-free light, ensuring visual comfort and utility in everyday life.
espelho-redondo-led-sem-aro.zh: 圆形LED镜将优雅设计与智能功能相结合，非常适合当代风格的浴室。黑色饰面的圆形结构为空间带来精致感和现代感。采用高强度技术PET材料制造，即使在高湿度条件下也能提供坚固性和经久耐用性。集成防雾技术确保镜面始终清洁明亮。LED照明提供柔和连续无眩光的光线，确保日常使用中的视觉舒适性和实用性。

espelho-redondo-led-com-aro-preto.en: The Round LED Mirror with black rim combines elegant design and smart functionality, ideal for bathrooms with a contemporary style. The circular structure with black finish brings sophistication and modernity to the space. Made from high-resistance technical PET, it offers robustness and longevity even under conditions of high humidity, maintaining durability over time. The integrated anti-fog technology ensures a mirror that is always clean and clear. The LED lighting offers soft, continuous and glare-free light, ensuring visual comfort and utility in everyday life.
espelho-redondo-led-com-aro-preto.zh: 带黑色边框的圆形LED镜将优雅设计与智能功能相结合，非常适合当代风格的浴室。黑色饰面的圆形结构为空间带来精致感和现代感。采用高强度技术PET材料制造，即使在高湿度条件下也能提供坚固性和经久耐用性。集成防雾技术确保镜面始终清洁明亮。LED照明提供柔和连续无眩光的光线，确保日常使用中的视觉舒适性和实用性。

espelho-redondo-led-sem-aro-simples.en: The frameless round LED mirror stands out for its minimalist and contemporary design, without a visible rim, ideal for modern bathrooms and environments that favour a clean aesthetic. Made from high-resistance technical PET, it offers robustness and longevity even under conditions of high humidity. It includes anti-fog technology, ensuring a mirror that is always clear and functional. The integrated LED lighting emits soft, continuous and glare-free light, perfect for daily use. This solution combines elegance and technology, elevating the environment with a discreet but essential presence for the comfort and functionality of the space.
espelho-redondo-led-sem-aro-simples.zh: 无框圆形LED镜以其极简当代设计风格脱颖而出，无可见边框，非常适合现代浴室和注重简洁美学的空间。采用高强度技术PET材料制造，即使在高湿度条件下也能提供坚固性和耐用性。配备防雾技术，确保镜面始终清晰且实用。集成LED照明发出柔和连续无眩光的光线，非常适合日常使用。该解决方案将优雅与技术融为一体，以低调而不可或缺的存在提升空间的舒适性和功能性。

espelho-arqueado-led-sem-aro.en: The frameless arched LED mirror combines contemporary design with the functionality that everyday life demands. With soft lines and an elegant shape, it is ideal for modern bathroom spaces that value aesthetics and comfort. Made from high-resistance technical PET. The diffused LED light provides soft, uniform and glare-free illumination, ideal for daily tasks. An intelligent design piece that transforms routine with a touch of sophistication and discreet technology.
espelho-arqueado-led-sem-aro.zh: 无框弧形LED镜将当代设计与日常所需的功能性相结合。以柔和线条和优雅造型呈现，非常适合注重美学和舒适性的现代浴室空间。采用高强度技术PET材料制造。漫射LED光线提供柔和均匀无眩光的照明，非常适合日常使用。这是一款智能设计作品，以一抹精致感和低调技术感改变日常例行体验。

espelho-arqueado-alto-led-com-aro-preto.en: The Tall Arched Smart Mirror with LED combines modern design with advanced functionality. The black frame adds a contemporary and sophisticated touch, perfect for any environment. Made from high-resistance technical PET, it integrates LED technology, which provides soft, homogeneous and glare-free light, improving the visual experience. An intelligent solution that combines design, innovation and everyday comfort.
espelho-arqueado-alto-led-com-aro-preto.zh: 高弧形LED智能镜将现代设计与先进功能相结合。黑色边框增添了当代精致感，非常适合任何环境。采用高强度技术PET材料制造，集成LED技术，提供柔和均匀无眩光的光线，提升视觉体验。这是一款将设计、创新与日常舒适完美结合的智能解决方案。

espelho-oval-led-com-aro-dourado.en: The oval LED mirror combines sophisticated aesthetics with modern functionality, ideal for spaces that value detail. With a high-resistance technical PET structure and full-body format, it adapts to demanding and humid environments. The gold rim stands out for its elegance, creating contrast and a distinctive focal point. The LED lighting provides soft, homogeneous and glare-free light, improving the visual experience. An intelligent solution that combines design, innovation and everyday comfort.
espelho-oval-led-com-aro-dourado.zh: 椭圆形LED镜将精致美学与现代功能相结合，非常适合注重细节的空间。采用高强度技术PET材料结构，全身镜规格，可适应严苛和潮湿的环境。金色边框以其优雅感脱颖而出，创造对比效果和独特视觉焦点。LED照明提供柔和均匀无眩光的光线，提升视觉体验。这是一款将设计、创新与日常舒适完美结合的智能解决方案。
